1: primary prize pool only. Layer 2: per-entry bonding curve; each buy credits      `secondaryLiquidityPerEntry[entryId]` for OPEN/CANCELLED sell-back pricing.      On settlement, all per-entry secondary balances are merged into `secondaryLiquidityPerEntry[secondaryWinningEntry]`      so winning-entry ERC1155 holders redeem pro-rata against the full secondary TVL (or it spills to primary payouts      if there is no supply on the winning entry). primaryEntryInvestmentShareBps splits each buy into owner leg then buyer leg.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"secondaryDepositedPerEntry":{"details":"Updated on secondary buys and reduced pro-rata on sells; not used for
